system.description:
LEVEL 3

Summon Hive. Action: Summon an immobile Hive within Reach 6 (max INT Hives at a time). At the end of your turn each Hive spawns a swarm: roll 1d6 for each Hive. Whenever you or your minions attack, expend these dice, divvying them up as damage amongst any enemies within Reach 6 of a hive.

LEVEL 7

Rampant Brood. Action: Your Hives can Interpose for you or allies. Whenever a Hive dies, it spawns a swarm twice. Whenever you command your minions, your Hives can also move.

LEVEL 11

Instant Infestation. 2 Actions: Use Pilfered Power to spawn INT Hives. You can expend swarm dice whenever an enemy comes within Reach 6 of a Hive.

LEVEL 15

Swarming Clouds. Enemies within Reach 2 of your hives attack with disadvantage. Your Hives are immune to non-critical Ranged attacks.
